notifications.title: AIUX Lab 1.8.0 is here
notifications.body: This release bundles the Figma extraction MCP servers into the DMG, fixes mermaid rendering in packaged builds, and adds the E2E automation suite. Review what changed before you continue.

notifications.title: Node 24+ and pnpm 10+ required
notifications.body: AIUX Lab needs Node.js >= 24.14.1 and pnpm >= 10. Older versions break the build and widget compile. Run `node -v` and `pnpm -v` to confirm.

notifications.title: Pin @servicenow/karuna@^0.3.0
notifications.body: New apps must use the karuna meta-package at ^0.3.0. 5.x and fragmented aiux-* deps break the build.

notifications.title: Widgets with a server script need @server()
notifications.body: Add @server('./server-script.js') to widgets that have a server-script.js, or the build emits no XML ("Missing widget XMLs").

notifications.title: Required toolchain is missing or outdated
notifications.body: AIUX Lab detected that Node.js, pnpm, or git is missing or below the required version. Widget builds and the ServiceNow SDK will not work until this is fixed. Install Node 24+ and pnpm 10+ from Setup.

notifications.title: ServiceNow SDK path not configured
notifications.body: The Karuna / ServiceNow SDK path is not set. Widget deploys and instance sync will fail. Configure it in Settings.

notifications.title: AIUX CLI is not linked
notifications.body: The aiux CLI is not globally linked, so terminal commands and some automations won't be available. Re-link it from Setup.

notifications.title: A newer AIUX Lab build is available
notifications.body: You're running an outdated build. Update to the latest DMG to get the newest fixes and avoid config drift.

notifications.title: Figma token not configured
notifications.body: Add a Figma token in Settings to enable design import and Figma extraction.
